summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of Kredyble fintech admin dashboard completed. Backend API testing achieved 97.1% success rate (34/35 tests passed). Frontend testing successfully verified login flow, all 14 page navigation, KPI cards, charts, transaction details, and logout functionality.

minor_bugs.issue: Endpoint expects query parameter 'action' but receives it in request body
minor_bugs.impact: Risk alert action feature may not work correctly

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - charts may not render optimally on initial load
Missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility

passed_tests: Dashboard page loads with 6 KPI cards and charts
Sidebar navigation to all 14 pages (Dashboard, Collections, Transactions, Payouts, Payment Links, Beneficiaries, Offers, Memberships, Users, Revenue Analytics, PG Charges, GST, Risk, Support)
Transaction row click opens detail drawer
Payouts page with 4 tabs (Completed, In Process, Failed, etc.) working
Payment Links page loads with metrics
Risk & Flags page displays 15 risk alerts
Backend API endpoints (34 out of 35 working)
Volume and revenue chart data API
All CRUD operations for payouts, payment links, users, beneficiaries, memberships, offers
Revenue analytics and GST calculation APIs
